title: Non-record: add HelixRecur v2 shared-depth recurrence submission
author: fumbl8

data.description: Shared-depth recurrent transformer with 6 shared blocks reused across 11 virtual passes in a 0,1,2,3,4,5,4,3,2,1,0 schedule.
Tied embeddings are preserved from the donor model.
Cheap motif-sensitive local branch using hashed bigram features.
Local-feature mixer preserved from the donor model.
Partial rotary position encoding used in the transformer.
Cross/self-attention variant applied on the last 4 layers.
Shared value embeddings used on selected layers.

novel_contributions: Adds a compact shared-depth recurrence variant with 6 shared blocks over 11 virtual passes.
Introduces only 44 trainable parameters via an 11x4 virtual-depth conditioning table.
Uses bounded per-pass scalar modulation of LN scale, attention output scale, MLP output scale, and q_gain.
Improves the quick validation proxy over HelixRecur v1 while slightly reducing total bytes.
Preserves a strong byte-efficiency story through shared blocks and minimal depth-specific conditioning.
